LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF LEONARD MENDOZA'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. THE FISH DECLARATION SHOWS THAT THE PARTIES FAILED TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENSE COUNSEL TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE IMMEDIATELY. A RENEWED DEMURRER TO THE ANSWER, IF ANY, SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED BY NOVEMBER 13, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302)
